title: Daewoo 1.7L Glass Kettle, Fast Boil, 2200W Electric Kettle with LED Light, Auto Shut-Off, Boil-Dry Protection, 360° Base, Clear Design
features: Fast Boil Performance – With a powerful 2200W heating element, this kettle brings 1.7 litres of water to the boil quickly, saving you time during busy mornings
Stylish Glass Body with LED Illumination – Watch your water boil in the clear glass chamber lit by a modern blue LED light – a functional and visual upgrade for your kitchen
Built-In Safety Features – Includes automatic shut-off after boiling and boil-dry protection to prevent overheating and ensure peace of mind with every use
360° Rotational Base – Easily lift and place the kettle back from any angle, ideal for both right- and left-handed users with flexible kitchen positioning
Easy to Use and Maintain – Features a push-button lid, water gauge, removable filter, and wide opening for effortless filling, pouring, and cleaning
description: This Daewoo borosilicate glass and stainless steel kettle is styled with an LED indicator making the kettle suitable for any trendy kitchen. The concealed heating element and removable lime scale filter makes cleaning your kettle easy and mess-free.
